job.title: PHP Full Stack Developer @ Unfolded (MH, IN)
job.description:
A PHP Full Stack Developer is responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining both the front-end user interface and back-end server-side logic of web applications. They bridge the gap between user experience and database architecture using PHP frameworks alongside modern JavaScript libraries. [1, 2]Job SummaryWe are looking for a skilled PHP Full Stack Developer to join our engineering team. In this role, you will manage the entire software development lifecycle, from conceptualization to deployment and maintenance. You will write clean, scalable back-end code using PHP frameworks (like Laravel or Symfony) and build responsive, interactive front-end elements. A strong understanding of database management, secure coding practices, and API integrations is essential for success. [1, 2, 3]

**Key Responsibilities Back-End Development**

Build efficient, testable, and reusable PHP modules and core logic.

Develop and maintain web applications using MVC frameworks like Laravel or CodeIgniter.

Design, create, and integrate robust RESTful APIs and third-party services.

Solve complex architectural challenges and application performance bottlenecks. [1, 2, 3]

**Front-End Development**

Develop responsive, interactive user-facing features using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript.

Integrate front-end interfaces with modern frameworks like React, Vue.js, or Angular.

Utilize CSS preprocessors and utility frameworks like Bootstrap or Tailwind CSS.

Ensure cross-browser compatibility and seamless UI/UX execution across all screen sizes. [1, 2, 3, 4]

**Database & Security**

Design, optimize, and manage relational databases using MySQL, MariaDB, or PostgreSQL.

Write complex, optimized SQL queries and manage data schema migrations.

Implement essential web security principles, including prevention of SQL injection and XSS attacks.

Manage secure user authentication, token-based authorization, and session handling. [1, 2, 3, 4]

**Deployment & Collaboration**

Manage code repositories using Git and collaborative workflows like GitHub or GitLab.

Containerize applications using Docker and set up basic CI/CD pipelines.

Collaborate closely with project managers, system administrators, and UI/UX designers.

Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade existing application software stacks. [1, 2, 3, 4]

**Required Skills & Qualifications**

Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or equivalent practical experience.

PHP Expertise: Proficient in core PHP, OOP principles, and modern PHP framework architectures.

Front-End Stack: Strong proficiency in raw JavaScript, jQuery, HTML5, CSS3, and asynchronous programming (AJAX/JSON).

Database Design: Hands-on experience with SQL query building, indexing, and relational schema optimization.

Tools & Systems: Experience with Git version control, package managers (Composer/NPM), and Linux environments.

Soft Skills: Excellent analytical problem-solving abilities, high attention to detail, and proactive communication habits. [1, 2, 3, 4]

**Preferred Qualifications**

Experience working with cloud platforms like Amazon Web Services (AWS) or Google Cloud Platform (GCP).

Familiarity with Content Management Systems (CMS) like WordPress plugin and theme development.

Knowledge of server configurations, web servers (Apache, Nginx), and caching layers (Redis, Memcached).

Exposure to automated testing frameworks like PHPUnit

job.title: Principal Software Quality Engineer @ Sabre (KA, IN)
job.description:
**Powering the agentic revolution in travel.** Sabre is an AI-native technology leader, backed by one of the world’s largest travel data clouds. Built on an open, modular, cloud-native architecture, Sabre serves as the backbone for both established leaders and bold, new disruptors, guiding them to the next age of travel retailing through intelligent, connected, and personalized experiences. With AI at its core and operating at unparalleled scale, Sabre transforms insights into innovation, empowering airlines, hoteliers, agencies and other partners to retail, distribute and fulfill travel worldwide.

Development & Engineering General Job Description
  
Team Description
  
  
Sabre is seeking a talented Principal Tester to support the Conferma Team. This person will report to the Manager Software Engineering.
  
  
Team description……
  
  
Our Development teams at Conferma build and maintain the systems that enable billions of pounds of B2B payments each year. They have engineered connectivity to over 70 of the world’s best commercial card partners, over 700 travel management companies and over 150 travel technology partners. They build the mobile, web and backend platforms that streamline payment processes, reduce admin and improve cashflow for our customers.

As our Principal tester, you will be our brightest and best. You will lead the way on how we perform testing. You will be responsible for assessing and enhancing our testing processes, implementing automation proficiency and evaluating and recommending the tools and technologies we should use to ensuring high-quality software delivery. You will rigorously enforce testing standards and ensure our application stack is fit for future. We have ambitious plans and you will be delivering the software that will allow us to deliver upon these.
  
We partner with some of the biggest names in finance and banking and this requires high standards. You will work with our product teams to deliver exciting new features and help us reach new markets worldwide. You will play a key role in ensuring we deliver software that is extensible, robust, performant and secure.  
  
  
  
Role and Responsibilities:

* Evaluating and recommending tools and technologies used within our testing process.
* Staying up to date with relevant testing technologies and approaches, understanding their capabilities and proposing and promoting appropriate use within Conferma.
* Ensuring the team is working efficiently, effectively and delivering high-quality software.
* Acting as a Subject Matter Expert and technical authority across the testing area.
* Continually assessing and evaluating the performance of our test function, recommending areas for improvement and implementing these successfully.
* Mentoring, coaching and developing members of the department.
* Providing technical guidance and consultancy to all squads, unblocking issues and resolving problems.
* Effectively communicate testing progress, risks, and issues to project managers, developers, and other stakeholders.
* Ensuring the team deliver the highest quality comprehensive testing, adhering to company and industry best practices.
* Driving continuous improvement. Identifying tools and other opportunities to improve and modernize the testing process, translating these into actionable proposals.
Maintaining a high proficiency in multiple testing technologies and disciplines.  

Qualifications and Education Requirements:

* Minimum 10 years of related experience
* Degree in Engineering / equivalent certifications
* Proven commercial experience in testing across multiple phases in an enterprise Agile environment.
* Proven commercial experience using Postman and Playwright.
* Demonstratable expertise in leading manual and automated testing using a variety of tools and approaches.
* Demonstrable expertise in leading Functional Testing, Performance Testing,
* Load Testing, Accessibility Testing, Penetration Testing, Security Testing and other appropriate test phases.
* A strong background in mentoring, coaching and leading testers at different of levels of experience.
* Demonstrable knowledge of industry best practices, test processes and methodologies and experience applying and enforcing these across multiple teams.
* Understanding and experience of adhering to third party standards in areas such as security and accessibility.
* Proven experience leading the successful delivery of secure, scalable, and reliable solutions.

We will give careful consideration to your application and review your details against the position criteria. You will receive separate notification as your application progresses.

Please note that only candidates who meet the minimum criteria for the role will proceed in the selection process.

job.description:

ZEISS India has 3 production facilities, R&D center, Global IT services and about 40 Sales & Service offices in almost all Tier I and Tier II cities in India. With 2200+ employees and continued investments over 25 years in India, ZEISS’ success story in India is continuing at a rapid pace.

Further information at ZEISS India .

**Company Name:**

Carl Zeiss India Bangalore ZEISS India

**Position** **Title:**

**Software Engineer (Global Role)**

**Department:**

CIT

**Location**

Bangalore (ZIGCC)

**Employment**

**type**

Full Time

### **About the Team**

The **Monetization Platforms** department is one of the strategic units within Corporate IT and is responsible for Design, development & management of Billing, Licensing and Subscription Solutions as three central services across the ZEISS Group worldwide.

### **Your Role**

As a **Software Engineer (Global Role) with 2-7 years** , you are responsible for the backend development on Azure for Licensing platform at Zeiss.

**Your key responsibilities:**

**Must-Have Skills (Non-Negotiable):**

* Several years of hands-on experience developing backend services on Microsoft Azure, especially Azure App Services / Web Apps and Azure Functions
* Strong proficiency in C# / .NET for building scalable, maintainable, and testable backend APIs
* Proven experience designing and implementing RESTful APIs (request/response design, versioning, error handling)
* Practical experience operating production systems: monitoring, incident handling, troubleshooting, and performance optimization
* Strong focus on code quality, clean architecture, and secure coding practices
* Experience working in agile development teams (Scrum/Kanban) using Git-based workflows and pull requests

**Core Technical Requirements:**

* Advanced proficiency in C# / .NET for cloud-native development (e.g. or newer)
* Hands-on experience with Azure Functions (HTTP triggers, timer triggers, queues/topics, bindings) and Azure App Services
* Solid experience with Infrastructure as Code (IaC), e.g. using Bicep, ARM templates, Terraform, or similar, to provision and manage Azure resources
* Experience with Azure DevOps for CI/CD (build and release pipelines, YAML pipelines, artifact management)
* Experience implementing authentication & authorization (e.g. Azure AD / Entra ID, OAuth2/OIDC, role-based access)
* Hands-on experience with logging, monitoring, and diagnostics using Azure Application Insights and related tooling
* Familiarity with automated testing (unit, integration, and API tests) integrated into the CI/CD pipeline
* Knowledge of Azure data services (e.g. Storage, SQL) is helpful but not required

**Broader Responsibilities the Candidate Will Own:**

* Design, implementation, and maintenance of central backend services for software licensing used across ZEISS business units
* End-to-end ownership of services over their full lifecycle: development, deployment, monitoring, incident handling, and continuous improvement
* Implementation and maintenance of Infrastructure as Code for backend services and related Azure resources
* Collaboration with architects, client engineers (C++ / C#), and the React portal team to ensure consistent end-to-end flows for licensing use cases
* Definition and implementation of non-functional requirements (security, reliability, scalability, performance, observability) for backend services
* Continuous optimization and automation of build, test, and deployment pipelines in Azure DevOps
* Participation in on-call / incident processes as required, including root-cause analysis and long-term remediation
* Contribution to architecture decisions, coding standards, and documentation within the backend and platform teams

**Basic Requirements:**

* University degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a comparable qualification
* Typically, 2 years of professional experience as a backend or cloud engineer on the Microsoft stack
* Proven experience delivering and operating Azure-based backend solutions in a professional environment
* Experience working in international, cross-functional teams within corporate IT or product development
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a structured, proactive, and reliable working style
* Good communication skills in English, both written and spoken

**Solid understanding of:**

* Cloud-native backend architectures on Azure (microservices, serverless, APIs, integration patterns)
* REST API design principles, including authentication, authorization, error handling, and versioning
* DevOps concepts and CI/CD practices with Azure DevOps (pipelines, environments, approvals, rollback strategies)
* Infrastructure as Code principles (idempotency, modularization, environments, reviewable changes) and their application in Azure
* Security and compliance requirements in enterprise environments (identity and access management, secrets management, data protection)
* Observability practices (logging, metrics, tracing, dashboards, alerting) for production systems
* Resilience and reliability patterns (retry, circuit breaker, timeouts, graceful degradation) in distributed systems
* Collaboration with Business Analysts and other stakeholders to translate requirements into robust backend solutions
* Basic understanding of software licensing concepts and workflows is a plus

### **About Zeiss:**

Join us at ZEISS, the global leader in optics and optoelectronics with market-leading positions in its four main segments: **Semiconductor Manufacturing Technology, Industrial Quality & Research, Medical Technology, and Consumer Markets** (which includes Vision Care, Sports & Cine Optics, and Photography) since 1846. The company is known for shaping technological progress and offers a wide range of solutions for various fields, including life sciences, healthcare, eye care, and industrial quality.

Headquartered in Oberkochen, Germany, we're a global powerhouse with over 50,000 dedicated employees spanning more than 50 countries. Our relentless pursuit of innovation has earned us a reputation as a leading technology enterprise.

### **What You Can Expect**

* A strategically relevant role within ZEISS’ **central monetization platform landscape**
* Significant room for shaping and evolving modern developer ecosystems
* Collaboration in an interdisciplinary and international environment
* Long‑term perspective at a globally leading technology company

Location: Bangalore

* Strong proficiency in C# / .NET for building scalable, maintainable, and testable backend APIs
* Proven experience designing and implementing RESTful APIs (request/response design, versioning, error handling)
* Practical experience operating production systems: monitoring, incident handling, troubleshooting, and performance optimization

**Fullstack Software Developer**
--------------------------------

### **Roles & Responsibilities**

* You will be working with modern web technologies across the full stack, including Typescript, Node.js/NestJS, React.js/Next.js, Python frameworks, cloud infrastructure, and GenAI-powered tooling.
* Design, build, and maintain scalable web applications, APIs, and services spanning frontend, backend, and database layers.
* Develop and integrate GraphQL and REST APIs to support performant, maintainable applications.
* Architect and develop features that leverage GenAI capabilities to enhance product functionality and user experience.
* Key technologies this role will employ: Node.js, NestJS, React.js, Next.js, Python (Django/Flask/FastAPI), MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, GraphQL, Redis/RabbitMQ, AWS, and DevOps tooling.
* You are an experienced and mature engineer who wants to build incredible products while contributing to architecture, tooling, and process decisions for the team.
* Collaborate closely with designers, product managers, and other engineers to ship end-to-end features.
* Review code, mentor junior team members, and help maintain engineering best practices.

### **Desired Skills & Experience**

* 3 to 5 years of experience in Software Development with a strong focus on full-stack web development.
* Proficient in the MERN stack — Node.js/NestJS, React.js/Next.js, MongoDB — with production experience.
* Experience with SQL databases such as MySQL and PostgreSQL, including schema design and query optimization.
* Working experience with Python and at least one web framework — Django, Flask, or FastAPI.
* Hands-on experience building and consuming GraphQL APIs.
* Experience with caching/queuing services such as Redis or RabbitMQ.
* Exposure to GenAI tools, APIs, or frameworks (e.g., OpenAI/LLM integrations, prompt engineering, RAG pipelines) and interest in applying them to product development.
* Working knowledge of AWS services (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, etc.) and basic DevOps practices (CI/CD, containerization, deployment pipelines).
* Proficient in algorithms, data structures, and software design patterns.
* Understanding of microservices architecture and API design principles.
* Ability to operationalize code with proper logging, monitoring, error handling, and testing.
* Experience with agile methodologies and modern software development lifecycles.
* You're willing to learn new technologies and frameworks as the ecosystem evolves.
* Communication: You like discussing a plan upfront, welcome collaboration, and are an excellent verbal and written communicator.
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience.

### **Bonus points if you...**

* Have experience with Docker, Kubernetes, or serverless architectures.
* Have built or fine-tuned GenAI/LLM-based features in production (chatbots, copilots, RAG systems, agentic workflows).
* Have experience with WebSockets or real-time data pipelines.
* Have contributed to open-source projects.
* Have experience with infrastructure-as-code tools like Terraform.
* Have worked in a startup or fast-paced product environment handling end-to-end ownership of features.

job.title: Sr Manager, Software Development Engineering (Java Fullstack) @ Charles Schwab (TS, IN)
job.description:
Hyderabad, Telangana

**Requisition ID** 2026-124105 **Category** Engineering & Software Development **Position type** Regular

  

**Your opportunity**
--------------------

**Schwab Description:**

At Charles Schwab, our purpose is simple: we champion client’s goals with passion and integrity. Guided by honesty, mutual respect and a commitment to doing what’s right, we bring innovation, education, and service together to help shape financial futures. Our people are the foundation of our success – they approach their work with curiosity and collaboration, coming together to create solutions that make a meaningful impact for clients and communities. As we expand into India, we are bringing this same culture of inclusion, learning, and opportunity to new talent. Joining us means becoming part of a global team where your work matters and your future can take shape.

**Schwab India:**

ur Hyderabad location is central to Schwab’s growth, bringing together talented people and technology to drive innovation, scale and efficiency. Here, you will work alongside teams who create solutions that support millions of clients every day. The work you do is more than daily operations – it’s a chance to experiment, learn, and build within a values-driven, supportive environment. This is a unique opportunity to be part of our early growth phase and shape something new, backed by the stability and strength of a Fortune 500 company. Your impact begins on day one, and your contributions will help define our future in the region.

**What you have**
-----------------

**Role Description:**

At Schwab, you’re empowered to make an impact on your career. Here, innovative thought meets creative problem solving, helping us “challenge the status quo” and transform the finance industry together. Schwab Technology Services enables the future of how clients manage their money by providing innovative and reliable technology products and services as part of our ongoing commitment to democratize access to investing and financial planning. We believe in the importance of in-office collaboration and fully intend for the selected candidate for this role to work on site in the specified location(s).  
Schwab Asset Management Technology supports the research and asset management platforms that help clients plan for their financial futures. Within this organization, the Investment Research Technology team builds and supports applications used by Schwab professionals and clients to make informed investment decisions.  
  
As a Software Engineer (hands-on) for Research Technology, you’ll lead through impact—contributing code, guiding technical direction, and mentoring others as we modernize key research capabilities across on-premises and cloud environments. You’ll partner closely with product, architecture, and research stakeholders in an Agile and DevOps model to deliver secure, scalable solutions that improve the experience for the people who rely on Schwab’s research platforms every day.

**Key Responsibilities:**

• Lead the design and delivery of full-stack software capabilities for investment research initiatives, setting technical direction while remaining hands-on across design, development, and support.  

* Partner with product owners, researchers, architects, and engineering leaders to translate business strategy into technical roadmaps and clear delivery plans.
* Own the architecture for cloud-ready, event-driven services and integration patterns, driving scalability, reliability, and reuse across the broader platform.
* Champion engineering excellence across the team through clean code, automated testing, observability, and secure-by-design delivery standards.
* Advance the team’s delivery model by maturing CI/CD workflows and DevOps practices to improve quality and speed to production.
* Lead the resolution of complex production and integration issues, and drive long-term resiliency and operational improvements.

Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.

Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!

  

**Job Description**

The DST Business Analyst and Business Intelligence Developer for Husky will be responsible for designing, delivering, and maintaining the company’s enterprise business intelligence ecosystem, leveraging both internal and external data sources. This role will lead the development and support of enterprise-wide BI applications, data models, and analytics architecture. Working closely with senior business and IT stakeholders, the position will translate strategic data and information requirements into actionable solutions that enable data-driven decision making.

The incumbent will address complex technical challenges, optimize performance across BI platforms, and define data elements that drive meaningful insights and measurable business value. The role will also establish testing standards, develop and deliver training programs to enhance user adoption, and promote self‑service analytics. Additionally, this position will define governance standards, policies, and procedures for BI tools and data structures, establish data quality metrics, and evaluate emerging technologies to support continuous improvement of Husky’s enterprise BI capabilities.

**Key Responsibilities & Key Success Metrics**

* Leading BI software development, deployment and maintenance
* Perform Data Profiling and Data Analysis activities to understand data sources
* Report curation, template definition and analytical data modeling
* Work with cross-functional teams to gather and document reporting requirements
* Translate business requirements into specifications that will be used to implement the required reports and dashboards, created from potentially multiple data sources
* Identifies and resolves data reporting issues in a timely fashion, while looking for continuous improvement opportunities.
* Build solutions that create value and resolve business problems
* Provide technical guidance to designers and other stakeholders
* Work effectively with members of Digital Solutions Team
* Troubleshoots analytics tool problems and tunes for performance
* Develops semantic layer and analytics query objects for end users
* Translation of business questions and requirements into reports, views, and analytics query objects
* Ensuring that quality standards are met
* Supporting Master Data Management Strategy

**Qualifications:**

**Technical Skills & Experience**

* Strong understanding of ERP and operational system data structures, with the ability to interpret, navigate, and optimize complex relational databases.
* Advanced proficiency in writing high‑performance SQL queries against large‑scale, complex datasets, including optimization and troubleshooting.
* Hands‑on experience in data visualization, dashboard design, and data storytelling, with the ability to translate analytical insights into clear, compelling, and actionable narratives.
* Experience designing, debugging, and deploying BI solutions within an Azure DevOps (ADO) environment, including CI/CD practices, version control, and release management.
* Proficiency with the Microsoft BI Stack, including:

* Power BI (data modeling, DAX, visualization best practices, Power BI Service)
* SQL Server Analysis Services (SSAS/AAS)—tabular model development, optimization, and deployment

Experience working with Azure Data Platform services such as Azure Data Lake Storage (ADLS), Azure Data Factory (ADF), Azure Synapse Analytics, and Power BI Service.

Knowledge of Databricks or Microsoft Fabric is considered a strong asset.

**Business & Functional Knowledge**

* Basic understanding of manufacturing and sales business processes, with the ability to translate operational requirements into analytical solutions.
* Experience working in an international or distributed business environment, collaborating across regions and time zones.

**Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills**

* Strong analytical capabilities, with the ability to interpret requirements, profile data, validate output, and ensure accuracy across BI solutions.
* Adept at diagnosing data inconsistencies, performance issues, and modeling challenges, proposing effective, scalable solutions.

**Communication & Collaboration**

* Excellent communication and presentation skills, capable of conveying technical concepts to business stakeholders in clear, understandable terms.
* Ability to facilitate meetings, workshops, and design sessions, enabling effective collaboration and informed decision-making.
* Strong interpersonal skills, with the ability to work collaboratively with cross‑functional teams, including Data Engineering, Business Analysts, and business partners.

**Language Requirements**

* Proficiency in English is required.
* Knowledge of German or French is considered an asset.

  

Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.
